✦ a celebration written in starlight ✦

Happy Birthday

may the year ahead bloom as gently as you do

drift down

For Maha, under this same sky

Happy Birthday, my love ❤️

You know you are the most beautiful thing that happened to me? The way you walk into a room and suddenly my heart forgets how to behave. One smile from you and I'm completely lost — and then I act dumb the whole time.

Today, I just want to remind you that you're the sweetest addiction I never want to quit. Your laugh is my favorite sound, your touch is my favorite feeling, and getting to call you mine is the luckiest thing in my world.

You make ordinary days feel like stolen moments in paradise. I love those moments when you feed me with your hands. You're gorgeous, you're brilliant, and you drive me crazy in all the right ways. I can't stop thinking about spoiling you, teasing you — and kissing you is a constant loop I can't escape.

So go ahead and shine today, baby — the world is lucky to have you in it. I'm even luckier to be the one who gets to love you so deeply.

Happy Birthday. May your all delulu come trululu 🌙

— Sam

Make a wish on a star, just for today

tap Saturn ✦
Whatever you wished for — I hope I get to watch it come true beside you.

Every star led back to us ✦

Made quietly, under the same sky, for Maha Khan. June 2026 ✦ forever a little starstruck
